summary: Iteration 79: Void Split Payment Fixes - Backend (12/12 tests PASS). All void split payment wallet reversal bugs verified fixed. Tested by actually voiding invoices: 1) Split payment void correctly deducts cash_amount from cashier (-510) AND digital_amount from digital wallet (-510), 2) Cash void now uses update_cashier_wallet helper which logs to wallet_movements, 3) Digital void uses update_digital_wallet helper which logs as 'digital_reversal', 4) Voided sales_log entries are excluded from all daily operations endpoints.

BUG_FIX_1_VOID_SPLIT_PAYMENT.description: Void didn't properly reverse split payments (only deducted from cashier, not digital wallet)
BUG_FIX_1_VOID_SPLIT_PAYMENT.test_method: Actual void test - voided SI-20260226-0122 (cash_amount=510, digital_amount=510)

BUG_FIX_2_WALLET_TRANSACTION_HISTORY_ON_.description: No wallet transaction history logged on void (used direct update instead of helper)

BUG_FIX_3_VOIDED_SALES_LOG_EXCLUDED.description: Voided sales still counted in sales_log aggregations
endpoints_tested: GET /api/daily-log - voided entries NOT in response

invoices.py_void_invoice.split_handling: Lines 865-881: Handles fund_source=='split' by reversing cash_amount from cashier AND digital_amount from digital wallet
invoices.py_void_invoice.cash_helper: Lines 891-896: Uses update_cashier_wallet helper (not direct update_one)
invoices.py_void_invoice.sales_log_voided: Lines 899-902: Marks sales_log entries as voided=True

daily_operations.py.voided_filter: All sales_log queries have 'voided': {'$ne': True} filter - lines 71, 83, 163, 351, 419, 586, 667, 749, 988

helpers.py.update_cashier_wallet: Lines 130-139: Logs to wallet_movements with type='cash_in' or 'cash_out'
helpers.py.update_digital_wallet: Lines 219-231: Logs to wallet_movements with type='digital_in' or 'digital_reversal'

critical_code_review_comments: void_invoice correctly handles all 3 fund_source types: split (reverses both), digital (update_digital_wallet), cashier (update_cashier_wallet)
All wallet updates now go through helpers which log to wallet_movements collection
sales_log.update_many adds voided=True, voided_at timestamp to all entries for the voided invoice
All 5 daily operations endpoints filter out voided entries using 'voided': {'$ne': True}
seed_data_creation: None - used existing IPIL BRANCH invoices. Note: 3 invoices were voided during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 verified all void split payment fixes. KEY FINDINGS: 1) Voiding split payment (SI-20260226-0122) correctly deducted cash_amount=510 from cashier AND digital_amount=510 from digital wallet. 2) All void operations now logged to wallet_movements - cashier shows 'cash_out' entries, digital shows 'digital_reversal' entries with reference like 'VOID SI-xxx'. 3) All daily operations endpoints (daily-log, daily-close-preview, unclosed-days, batch-preview, daily-report) correctly exclude voided sales_log entries using 'voided': {'$ne': True}. NOTE: 3 invoices were voided during testing: SI-20260226-0122 (split), SI-20260226-0126 (cash), SI-20260226-0120 (digital). Cashier balance is now -4110 (negative due to void reversals without new sales).
